sqlMap.select: select * from movalidationrule where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into movalidationrule(metaobjectno, structureno, name expression lvalue op rvalue message description ) values (#metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC#, #name# #expression# #lvalue# #op# #rvalue# #message# #description# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('movalidationrule') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select movalidationruleno, name, expression, lvalue, op, rvalue, message, description, metaobjectno, structureno from movalidationrule where movalidationruleno = #movalidationruleno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update movalidationrule set
name = #name# name = null expression = #expression# expression = null lvalue = #lvalue# lvalue = null op = #op# op = null rvalue = #rvalue# rvalue = null message = #message# message = null description = #description# description = null
where movalidationruleno = #movalidationruleno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from movalidationrule where movalidationruleno = #movalidationruleno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from movalidationrule where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
